title: gentiana glacialis var. pumila
intro: Gentiana glacialis var. pumila, also known as Alpine Gentian, is a small, alpine plant species that belongs to the Gentianaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and acting as a natural remedy for respiratory problems. Gentiana glacialis var. pumila can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular choice among herbalists for its potential medicinal uses.
